rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDDIE L BIVINS
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Sanctions And Memo. Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The motion for sanctions is denied. The moving papers contain no evidence that the moving party complied with the safe harbor requirements of CCP section 128.7(c)(1). In any event, the Court would not exercise its discretionary power under section 128.7(c) to award sanctions given all the circumstances of this case even if there were a violation of section 128.7(b). Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, 4/18/12.
